MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
NO APPEARANCE MADE BY THE DEFENDANT/MOVING PARTY, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
LAYLA MANN, IN PROPRIA PERSONA, (415)553-7715, PLAINTIFF/OPPOSING PARTY

PLAINTIFF DID NOT ADVISE THE DEFENDANT(MOVING PARTY) OF HER INTENT TO ARGUE THE MATTER. THEREFORE, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is granted. Plaintiff's complaint states no facts supporting a claim against defendants, and her opposing brief does not indicate any basis to conclude she could do so. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 (301/PJB/AL)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-07-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Layla Mann, 552-8374, plaintiff appearing in propria persona

No other appearances on this matter. Ms. Mann represented to the Court that the matter has been dismissed. The dismissal is not showing in the register of actions. The Court modified its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with 10 days leave to amend. No opposition filed. The matter will come off calendar if a file endorsed copy of the dismissal is submitted to the Court. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Sara Lerschen, CSR 6213
